channel.title: James Reynolds' web presence
channel.description: Traffic and transport engineer, researcher and occasional musician

item.title: Legitimising implementation - now in html
item.dc:creator: James Reynolds
item.description: A while ago I put together a two-page tufte-style handout about the legitimacy framework and nine pragmatic strategies that came out of my PhD thesis. That handout is good for circulating as a printed copy in person, but the online version available here has tended to be a bit awkward to share.

item.title: Welcome to this
item.dc:creator: James Reynolds
item.description: I need to put together a basic web presence to host some things on github pages. This is it. Welcome.
